checks.name: artifact_consistency_blueedge
checks.description: Artifact consistency validation on BlueEdge (fully governed)
checks.detail: 19/19 checks PASS — spine/proposition alignment, promotion/spine alignment, enrichment chain, reconciliation/registry match, event log integrity, revalidation/promotion consistency

checks.name: artifact_consistency_netbox
checks.detail: 12/13 PASS, 1 WARN (review_state missing — governance lifecycle incomplete). Correctly identifies legacy qualification gap.

checks.name: concurrent_lock_acquisition
checks.description: Write lock acquisition on governed artifact

checks.name: concurrent_lock_contention
checks.description: Second holder blocked from acquiring held lock
checks.detail: other-pipeline rejected with WriteLockHeld, expires countdown shown

checks.name: concurrent_lock_release
checks.detail: Lock released, list shows no active locks

checks.name: session_create
checks.detail: Session created with UUID, persisted to governance/sessions/

checks.name: session_persona_transition
checks.detail: EXECUTIVE→DENSE: authority capped L2→L1, depth reset to Z1

checks.name: session_authority_escalation
checks.description: Authority escalation with persona ceiling enforcement
checks.detail: L0→L2 GRANTED in EXECUTIVE, L2→L3 REJECTED in DENSE (max L1), L1→L5 REJECTED (exceeds ceiling)

checks.name: session_close
checks.description: Session close with final state recording

checks.name: authority_log_append
checks.description: Escalation events appended to JSONL log

checks.name: authority_log_summary
checks.detail: granted=1, rejected=2, tier_transitions tracked, rejection_reasons cataloged

checks.name: python_39_compatibility
checks.description: All P2 scripts compatible with Python 3.9.6
